\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{} % Clear all header and footer fields

% Set the footer
% [L]eft, [C]enter, or [R]ight - choose what works best for you
\fancyfoot[L]{\small © 2026 The Authors. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.}
\fancyfoot[R]{\small \thepage} % Adds page number to the right

% Optional: Remove the decorative line at the top
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt} % Add a thin line above the footer

\usepackage{setspace}
\onehalfspacing
